name: Pasta with Summer Vegetables in a Spicy Peanut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Boiling salted water for pasta (12 oz Rotelle pasta)
Thinly sliced carrots (2 Carrots)
Broccoli florets (1 1/2 cups)
Snow peas, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces (1/2 lb)
Thinness of scallions (4 Scallions)
1. In a small saucepan combine the peanut butter, soy sauce, vinegar, lime juice, garlic, cayenne, and hot water. Whisk the sauce together over moderate heat until smooth and hot.
2. Cook the pasta in boiling salted water for 5 minutes. Add sliced carrots to the cooking pasta, stir, and cook for 1 minute. Add broccoli, stir, and cook for 30 seconds. Add snow peas, stir, and cook for another 30 seconds.
3. Drain the pasta and vegetables in a colander. Transfer the mixture to a large bowl and pour the hot sauce over it. Toss to combine and sprinkle with thinly sliced scallions before serving.
